has_issue.title: Has Issue
has_issue.description: True if the user still has an unresolved issue.

new_goal.title: New Goal
new_goal.description: Unfinished goal from this conversation, or empty string.

new_style.title: New Style
new_style.description: Preferred communication style inferred from this conversation.

new_summary.title: New Summary
new_summary.description: Detailed 3-5 sentences summary considering previous facts.
